narrative:
Plymouth-Shiloh Local Sd (Richland) school district has 2,472 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
